title: Eclipse
description: A metallic fusion of silver and gold lustre creates a liquid-like shimmer across gunmetal lids.
ingredients: Simmondsia Chinensis Seed Oil (Organic Jojoba Oil)

images.alt: Eclipse Glitter Crumble. A neatly smudged swatch of crumbly, shimmering, gunmetal-brown, metallic eyeshadow.

The image shows a close-up of the model's face on a pale blue-to-green gradient background. The model's make-up is done with the focal point being a subtle, gunmetal-brown, shimmering eyeshadow made by the Eclipse Glitter Crumble.

The image shows a close-up of the model's face on a pale blue-to-green gradient background. The model's make-up is done with the focal point being a subtle, gunmetal-brown, shimmering eyeshadow made by the Eclipse Glitter Crumble.

The image shows four model's forearms laid next to each other in varying shades of skin colour. There is a line of ten Glitter Crumble swatches across all four arms to showcase how each product colour shows up on different skin tones.
